feedback_summary:
- Evidence gathering aborted at 'partial_honesty_abort' before independent test verification could run. All verification fields (tests, independent_tests, coverage_details, bdd, plan_audit, arch_review, requirements) are null. Cannot verify any acceptance criteria without independent evidence.: Fix the honesty discrepancies (especially the critical formatting issue in AC-001's test_file field) and re-submit so full evidence gathering can complete with independent test verification.
- Critical honesty discrepancy: completion_promise for AC-001 specifies test_file as 'tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py' (comma-separated string). The honesty checker tried to validate this as a literal path, which doesn't exist. The test_file field should contain a single path or an array, not a comma-separated string.: Use separate completion_promise entries for each test file, or use an array structure if the schema supports it. Do not use comma-separated values in a string field.
- 8 should-fix honesty discrepancies: Player claimed files in files_modified/files_created that show no changes in git status. These include orchestrator-managed paths (.claude/task-plans/), duplicate worktree paths, and unchanged files (test_output.txt). This pollutes the report with false claims.: Clean up files_modified/files_created to include only files actually modified this turn. Exclude: .claude/task-plans/ (orchestrator-managed), duplicate worktree/relative paths, and unchanged files.
... and 1 more issues
